name: Hidden Heir
short_description: Wield the power of magic and steel in a dark medieval world. Explore an open world, craft unique armor, fight enemies, and forge your destiny. A story-rich action-RPG with immersive realism.
detailed_description:
In the dark and mysterious lands of the Middle Ages, this action role-playing game invites players into an epic adventure where the destructive power of magic and the sharp edge of steel collide. Whether you evolve your character as a battle mage or a close-combat warrior, fight your enemies in your own unique style.

The open world, crafted with realistic graphics, is filled with dangers and secrets waiting to be uncovered. In this freely explorable realm, players can gather resources to forge their own armor and gear, shaping the gameplay according to their personal preferences.

A deeply woven storyline is brought to life through cinematic storytelling. The character’s past, the tragedy of their family, and the secrets behind the magic gradually unfold as the game progresses. The choices you make in dialogues affect not only your fate, but the course of the entire world.

With immersive quest chains, a variety of enemy types, and combat mechanics that require diverse strategies, the game emphasizes both action and tactical thinking. Every enemy is a challenge, and every piece of armor is a tale of triumph.

Shape your destiny, write your legend.

Each step is the gateway to a whole new world.

The paths are clear, your horse is ready. It’s time to explore.

As the wind tousles your hair and your steed gallops forward, you stand at the edge of boundless discovery. In every valley lies a secret, in every path a surprise. This world is for the brave. Ride on—there will be no need to look back when what's ahead is this unforgettable.

Darkness belongs not to the fearful, but to the seekers.

There is only silence... and the sound of drops coming from afar. Every step echoes off the stone walls. The darkness of the cave seems to try to swallow you, but you don’t falter. Because behind every darkness, there is a secret. Maybe an ancient spell, maybe a forgotten power... Or perhaps, it’s just a moment to face your fears. Gather your courage. The darkness is here to test you.

This is not a stagnant world, but a vibrant one

This place is not just about stone buildings or markets. In these streets, laughter rises, whispers echo.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
